mapper.sql: r.reply_idx, r.board_idx, r.mem_idx, r.reply_content, r.reply_ip, r.reply_regdate, r.reply_moddate, r.reply_is_deleted, r.reply_deldate, r.reply_ref, r.reply_step, r.reply_depth, m.mem_idx AS m_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS m_mem_id, m.mem_name AS m_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS m_mem_role_idx
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM reply r JOIN member m ON r.mem_idx = m.mem_idx WHERE r.board_idx = #{board_idx} AND r.reply_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY r.reply_ref ASC, r.reply_step ASC

SELECT
FROM reply r JOIN member m ON r.mem_idx = m.mem_idx WHERE r.reply_idx = #{reply_idx}

SELECT
FROM reply r JOIN member m ON r.mem_idx = m.mem_idx WHERE m.mem_id = #{mem_id} AND r.reply_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY r.reply_regdate DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('seq_reply_idx')
INSERT INTO reply ( reply_idx, board_idx, mem_idx, reply_content, reply_ip, reply_regdate, reply_is_deleted, reply_ref, reply_step, reply_depth ) VALUES ( #{reply_idx}, #{board_idx}, #{mem_idx}, #{reply_content}, #{reply_ip}, NOW(), 'N', #{reply_idx}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE reply SET reply_content = #{reply_content}, reply_moddate = NOW() WHERE reply_idx = #{reply_idx}
UPDATE reply SET reply_is_deleted = 'Y', reply_deldate = NOW() WHERE reply_idx = #{reply_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('seq_reply_idx')
INSERT INTO reply ( reply_idx, board_idx, mem_idx, reply_content, reply_ip, reply_regdate, reply_is_deleted, reply_ref, reply_step, reply_depth ) VALUES ( #{reply_idx}, #{board_idx}, #{mem_idx}, #{reply_content}, #{reply_ip}, NOW(), 'N', #{reply_ref}, #{reply_step}, #{reply_depth} )
